decision.rationale: The plate honors all cited identity rules. IR.claude-mascot.anatomy.no-hair is fully met as the top edge of the box remains completely bare and unbroken. IR.claude-mascot.face.construction-cross-line is successfully honored, as both the horizontal midline and the vertical centerline are clearly visible as faint pencil construction lines. IR.claude-mascot.palette.terracotta-orange-body is respected with a flat terracotta orange fill and graphite cross-hatching on the under and side planes. IR.claude-mascot.style.warm-graphite-line-cross-hatch is honored via varying-weight warm graphite contours and cross-hatch shading. Finally, IR.claude-mascot.face.two-dot-eyes-with-brows is honored within the context of the 'sleep' expression: the eyes are closed (rendered as symmetric downward arcs riding the horizontal midline) and capped by curved brow strokes carrying the emotion.
